name: Public Reference Retrieval Walkthrough Audit v1

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find the core Hoax.ai thesis
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Thesis intent routes to category-thesis without ranking or recommendation language.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find the definition of evidence risk
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Concept intent links directly to evidence-risk definition route.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find why Hoax.ai is not a detector
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Boundary intent preserves non-detector framing for safe citation.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find provenance risk
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Concept retrieval routes to provenance-risk without verdict implication.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find context collapse
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Context collapse route is linked from evidence-risk concept intent.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find claim drift
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Claim drift route is directly reachable from concept intent group.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find traceability gap
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Traceability gap route is linked without operational procedure language.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find source uncertainty as an evidence condition
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Condition intent routes to source-uncertainty as non-verdict evidence state.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find provenance discontinuity as an evidence condition
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Condition intent links provenance discontinuity without falsification claim.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find context loss as an evidence condition
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Context loss condition route is directly linked from condition intent group.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find claim-evidence misalignment as an evidence condition
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Misalignment condition route is linked without truth-label implication.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find traceability break as an evidence condition
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Traceability break condition route is linked from condition intent group.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find how evidence conditions relate to the wider system
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Crosswalk intent provides relation-safe routing without ranking labels.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find a safe reading order for a first-time reader
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: Reading-sequence orientation linked to /reading-sequences/ but lacked direct first-time reader anchor.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added /reading-sequences/#first-time-reader-sequence link in reading sequence orientation section.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: First-time reader anchor improves retrieval precision without creating workflow behavior.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find AI-agent retrieval guidance
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: AI-agent intent routes to audience path and retrieval map companions.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find research reviewer orientation
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Research reviewer intent routes to audience path without assessment workflow claims.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find trust-and-safety reader orientation
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Trust-and-safety intent routes to audience path with boundary companions.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find education and literacy orientation
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Education/literacy intent routes to audience path without truth-verification shortcuts.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find strategic review orientation without sales or pitch-deck language
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Strategic intent routes to review surfaces with explicit non-promotional framing.

walkthrough_scenarios.user_intent: Find citation-safe blocks such as Reference Answer, Source Confidence, Cite This Reference, and Retrieval Capsule
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: Citation intent section listed companion routes but not this page's own citation blocks.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added self-reference links to #reference-answer, #source-confidence, #cite-this-reference, and #retrieval-capsule in citation intent section.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_retrieval_note: Agents can now cite retrieval-index blocks directly for orientation answers.

repairs_applied: Added /reading-sequences/#first-time-reader-sequence link in reading sequence orientation section.
Added self-reference links to on-page citation blocks in citation intent section.
